cringe.name: Nibba-Nibbi Babu
cringe.deleteAllConfirmTitle: Sab Note Ka Ho Gaya Na?? 🥲
cringe.deleteAllConfirmText: Babu ke bina sab kuch chala gaya...😢💔
cringe.deleteAllEmptyMessage: Abe! Kya delete karna tha, kuch likha bhi nahi tha! 🤦‍♂️
cringe.deletePostConfirmText: Babu ki duniya se note gaya...poora ka poora...😱
cringe.noPostsMessage: Arre! Kya likhne ka mood nahi tha kya? ✍️
cringe.noResultsMessage: Babu kuch nahi mila, search aur add kar. 🔍
cringe.exportEmptyMessage: Babu, kuch likha nahi tha! Export kaise karoon? 🧐
cringe.importErrorInvalidFile: Babu, yeh PDF kya? Hum JSON chahte the! 😂
cringe.importErrorNotThoughts: Yeh Thoughts ka file nahi hai yaar! 🤦‍♂️
cringe.importErrorInvalidFormat: Yeh format toh bilkul bhi kaam ka nahi hai Babu! 😬
cringe.importErrorInvalidJSON: Arey yeh JSON bhi bhool gaya kya? 🙄
cringe.importConfirmText: Babu ke notes replace ya merge karna hai?
cringe.importSuccessMerge: Babu ke notes ho gaye merge! 😎
cringe.importSuccessReplace: Babu ka purana data gaya, naya aa gaya! 💥
cringe.footerAndroidGuide: Android: Menu (⋮) > Home Screen pe daal 😎
cringe.footerIOSGuide: iOS: Share (⬆) > Home Screen pe daal 📲
cringe.discardButton: Kuch Ghalat Ho Gaya! Discard Kar Babu 😅
cringe.discardConfirmText: Babu ne kuch nahi save kiya. Discard? 😜
cringe.footerMadeWithLove: Dil Se Banaya Babu ke liye ❤️
cringe.deleteLanguageConfirm: Arey, Babu language delete kar rahe ho? 😱
cringe.charLimitTitle: Arre Babu, Limit Cross Kar Di! 🚫
cringe.charLimitMessage: Babu ne limit cross kiya! Kam karo! 🤣
cringe.webStoreNote: Apna favourite language download karo Babu, aur upload kar! 📥
cringe.invalidFileMessage: Babu, file galat hai! Sahi file daalo! 📄
cringe.notThoughtsLanguage: Babu, yeh Thoughts ka language file nahi hai! 🛑
cringe.invalidJSONMessage: Yeh JSON valid nahi hai! Kya kiya tha Babu? 🤯
cringe.applyingLanguageMessage: Babu ka language apply ho gaya! 😎
cringe.addingLanguageTitle: Language Babu Ne Add Kar Di! ✅
cringe.addingLanguageMessage: Babu ka language upload ho gaya! 💥
cringe.deletingLanguageTitle: Language Babu Ne Delete Kar Di! 🗑️
cringe.welcomeMessage: Babu! Tera language set ho gaya! 😎
cringe.emptyPostMessage: Babu, kuch likhna hai! Pehle likho, phir post karo! ✍️
cringe.updateMessage: Babu, app refresh ho jayega! Save mat bhool jaana! 📲
cringe.updateFailedMessage: Update fail hogaya! Phir se try kar Babu! 😅
cringe.shareFallbackMessage: Copy hogaya abh share kar Babu!
cringe.footerDescription: Babu Ki App Chhoti Magar Masti Bhari! Sirf 1MB! 🚀🔥
cringe.volumeNotificationMessage: Babu, Sound Effects Ka Full Maza Lene Ke Liye Volume Full Kar Do! 📢🎶
cringe.whatsNewTitle: Babu, v{version} me kya naya hai? 🔥😎
